spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Center-focused for meditative feel
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for chart stats, wrapped in 1px gold/10 borders
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-6 to p-12 for content sections, ensuring breathing room
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl) or Neumorphism with 1px gold border

motion.philosophy: Breathing, celestial feel. Slow and smooth.
motion.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), opacity increase, subtle gold glow
motion.background: Gentle parallax or slow moving grain overlay

images.description: Starry night sky, for main celestial background wrapper
Abstract terracotta texture for earth elements
Black and white geometric wheel for chart background

icons.style: Minimalist, fine lines, stroke-width 1.5, matching text or gold color

components.name: EarthChartWheel
components.description: Circular diagram showing the 5-element wheel and Calendar sign. Uses abstract circles layered over each other.
components.styles: rounded-full border border-[rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md relative

components.name: SignCard
components.description: Card displaying one of the 12 Calendar Signs in the browse section.
components.styles: p-6 rounded-2xl bg-[#151921] border border-[rgba(212,175,55,0.1)] transition-all

components.name: ReadingSection
components.description: Container for AI-generated deep reading. Meditative layout.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build as an Expo React Native app using expo-router (.js files, NOT .tsx).
Implement bilingual support (FR/EN) natively with a context or i18n library.
No user auth and no database required (ephemeral local state only).
Ensure backgrounds use a blend of the starry night image (with low opacity) overlayed on deep #0B0D12, accented with seasonal gradients.
For typography, use expo-font to load 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope'.
Implement smooth staggered fade-in animations when the Earth Chart generates using React Native Reanimated or similar.
Ensure padding is generous and avoids standard dense layouts. The app should feel poetic, not like a data-dashboard.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, list items) to ensure correct automated testing.
